title: Base sec-certs definitions
description: Common definitions used across sec-certs schemas.

cpe_matches.title: CPE Matches
cpe_matches.description: List of CPEs (Common Platform Enumerations) associated with the certificate.

verified_cpe_matches.title: Verified CPE Matches
verified_cpe_matches.description: List of verified CPEs (Common Platform Enumerations) associated with the certificate.

related_cves.title: Related CVEs
related_cves.description: List of CVEs (Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures) likely associated with the certificate.

extracted_versions.title: Extracted Versions
extracted_versions.description: Product versions extracted from the certification documents.

pdf_file_size_bytes.description: Size of the PDF document in bytes.

pdf_is_encrypted.description: Indicates if the PDF document is encrypted.

pdf_number_of_pages.description: Number of pages in the PDF document.

pdf_hyperlinks.description: Set of hyperlinks found in the PDF document.

document_keywords.title: Certificate Document Keywords
document_keywords.description: Extracted keywords from the certification documents.
document_keywords.$comment: Consult the rules.yaml for the list of possible keywords and their structure.

convert_ok.description: Whether the document was successfully converted from PDF to text.

download_ok.description: Whether the document was successfully downloaded.

extract_ok.description: Whether keyword extraction from the document was successful.

source_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the source document, if available.

txt_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the text document, if available.

json_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the document json representation, if available.

document_state.title: Certificate Document State
document_state.description: State of the documents in the processing pipeline.
